---
title: "AIC_bootstrap"
---

::: {.callout-note appearance="minimal"}
**Source:** [`test/AIC_bootstrap.py`](https://github.com/simone-romiti/lattice_data_tools/blob/main/test/AIC_bootstrap.py)
:::


## API Reference

#### `test_result_keys` {#test_result_keys}

```python
def test_result_keys()
```

get_P_from_bootstraps should return y, wP, and P.

[View source ↗](https://github.com/simone-romiti/lattice_data_tools/blob/main/test/AIC_bootstrap.py#L36){.source-link style='font-size:0.8em;'}

---

#### `test_P_is_valid_cdf` {#test_p_is_valid_cdf}

```python
def test_P_is_valid_cdf()
```

P should be monotonically increasing, starting near 0 and ending near 1.

[View source ↗](https://github.com/simone-romiti/lattice_data_tools/blob/main/test/AIC_bootstrap.py#L43){.source-link style='font-size:0.8em;'}

---

#### `test_w_normalized_sums_to_P` {#test_w_normalized_sums_to_p}

```python
def test_w_normalized_sums_to_P()
```

Cumulative sum of w_normalized across models should equal P at each y point.

[View source ↗](https://github.com/simone-romiti/lattice_data_tools/blob/main/test/AIC_bootstrap.py#L50){.source-link style='font-size:0.8em;'}

---

#### `test_w_normalized_shape` {#test_w_normalized_shape}

```python
def test_w_normalized_shape()
```

wP should have shape (n_y_points, n_models).

[View source ↗](https://github.com/simone-romiti/lattice_data_tools/blob/main/test/AIC_bootstrap.py#L56){.source-link style='font-size:0.8em;'}

---

#### `test_percentiles_ordered` {#test_percentiles_ordered}

```python
def test_percentiles_ordered()
```

y16 <= y50 <= y84 must hold.

[View source ↗](https://github.com/simone-romiti/lattice_data_tools/blob/main/test/AIC_bootstrap.py#L61){.source-link style='font-size:0.8em;'}

---

#### `test_mean_near_true_mean` {#test_mean_near_true_mean}

```python
def test_mean_near_true_mean()
```

AIC mean should be within 2 sigma_syst of the true mean (5.0).

[View source ↗](https://github.com/simone-romiti/lattice_data_tools/blob/main/test/AIC_bootstrap.py#L67){.source-link style='font-size:0.8em;'}

---

#### `test_sigma2_tot_positive` {#test_sigma2_tot_positive}

```python
def test_sigma2_tot_positive()
```

[View source ↗](https://github.com/simone-romiti/lattice_data_tools/blob/main/test/AIC_bootstrap.py#L74){.source-link style='font-size:0.8em;'}

---

#### `test_sigma2_tot_in_expected_range` {#test_sigma2_tot_in_expected_range}

```python
def test_sigma2_tot_in_expected_range()
```

Total variance should be between stat-only and stat+syst combined.

[View source ↗](https://github.com/simone-romiti/lattice_data_tools/blob/main/test/AIC_bootstrap.py#L78){.source-link style='font-size:0.8em;'}

---
